name: Chicken & Rice Avgolemono
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces Frozen chopped spinach - thawed, thoroughly drained and squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick saucepan, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender.
3. Add drumsticks to the pan and brown on all sides; remove drumsticks to a plate using a slotted spoon.
4. Return drumsticks to the plate and add chicken broth and rice to the saucepan. Stir until the rice grains are separated.
5. Return drumsticks to the pan; cover and simmer until the chicken is cooked through, about 15 minutes.
6. In a small bowl, whisk together egg substitute, flour, and lemon juice (or reconstituted lemon juice) until smooth. Set aside.
7. With a slotted spoon, remove the cooked drumsticks to the serving platter.
8. Add spinach and dill to the rice mixture in the saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the rice has absorbed all the liquid in the pan, about 5 minutes.
9. Pour in the egg mixture and stir until just heated through, about 1 minute.
10. Spoon the rice mixture onto serving platters; top with chicken and garnish with lemon slices (optional).
